name: Easy Cheddar Swiss Fondue
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups Dry white wine or beer (300 mL)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cheddar and Swiss cheeses in a bowl. Sprinkle with flour; toss lightly to coat.
2. Heat the wine or beer in a medium saucepan until simmering but not boiling. Reduce heat to maintain temperature.
3. Gradually add the cheese mixture, by small handfuls, stirring constantly after each addition until the cheese melts (the mixture will appear curdled at first but smooths out as more of the cheese mixture is added).
4. Stir in salt and garlic powder. Transfer to a fondue pot and keep warm.
5. Serve with bread cubes for dipping. Makes about 2 3/4 cups (675 mL).
